name: TikTok Ads Tactics

ads_formats.name: In-Feed Ads
ads_formats.description: Short videos appearing natively in users’ feeds, blending with organic content.
ads_formats.use_when: Awareness / Consideration stage of buyer journey
ads_formats.why: Native placement increases exposure and relevancy early in the funnel.

ads_formats.name: Spark Ads
ads_formats.description: Boosting your existing organic TikTok posts as paid ads for wider reach.
ads_formats.use_when: When organic content is already performing well and you want to amplify it.
ads_formats.why: Leverages authenticity and existing engagement to improve efficiency.

ads_formats.name: TopView / Brand Takeovers
ads_formats.description: High-impact full-screen ads that appear when users open TikTok.
ads_formats.use_when: Big campaign launches, major brand announcements, or large product launches.
ads_formats.why: Maximizes reach and visibility quickly across the target audience.

ads_formats.name: Lead Generation Ads
ads_formats.description: Integrated lead forms to capture contact info directly within TikTok.
ads_formats.use_when: Intent is medium-to-high and goal is direct lead capture.
ads_formats.why: Allows direct collection of leads without redirecting off platform.

ads_formats.name: Retargeting Sequencing
ads_formats.description: A sequence of ads targeting users based on previous interactions.
ads_formats.use_when: Driving mid-lower funnel conversions by nurturing engaged audiences.
ads_formats.why: Improves conversion rates by refining audience relevance and timing.

deployment_logic.action: Start with In-Feed and Spark Ads
deployment_logic.goal: Build broad awareness and early engagement signals.
Begin capturing data from users showing higher intent.

deployment_logic.action: Use TopView for major launches or events
deployment_logic.goal: Drive brand top-of-mind and large-scale visibility.

best_practices: Localize ad creative for target region (Egypt/GCC/MENA).
Match ad creative with buyer journey stage intent.
Avoid overly aggressive 'push' messaging early in the funnel.
Use measurable CTAs (Form submit, Click-to-site, Demo request).
Monitor and optimize based on intent progression signals.

performance_signals.meaning: Indicates initial engagement and relevance of creative.
Shows interest and movement toward next step.
Direct sign of conversion intent from ads.
Efficiency measure for lead capture performance.
Tracking audiences that engage repeatedly (warm audiences).

avoid_if: Ad creative is not tied to a clear next step
Message is overly promotional with no value upfront
